calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Edward Mack Liu, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Yin Nin Siu and Defendants, Martin Gonzalez and Anna Gonzales appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
